features.title: 384D Vector Analytics
features.desc: Every data point embedded in 384-dimensional space. Semantic search, clustering, and anomaly detection powered by pgvector and HNSW indexing.

features.title: Hybrid Search Engine
features.desc: BM25 full-text combined with dense vector similarity and SPLADE sparse retrieval. Reciprocal Rank Fusion delivers the most relevant results.

features.title: DuckDB Analytics
features.desc: In-memory analytical processing with columnar storage. Run complex queries across terabytes of data in milliseconds.

features.title: Phi-Scaled Pipelines
features.desc: ETL and data transformation pipelines that scale with Fibonacci-stepped batch sizes and golden ratio resource allocation.

_schema.name: string (required)
_schema.sacredGeometry: Flower of Life | Seed of Life | Metatrons Cube | Vesica Piscis | Torus | Sri Yantra | Icosahedron | Fibonacci Spiral
_schema.canvasAnimation: sacred-nodes | enterprise-grid | sacred-geometry | torus-field | seed-of-life | connection-web | fibonacci-spiral | vesica-piscis | grid-monitor

customizable._note: Custom sites are stored in data/user-sites.json at runtime, created during onboarding
